name: Apple Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour and baking powder in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and stir in the milk and apples.
3. Combine the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients.
4. Drop spoonfuls of batter into hot oil (375°F).
5. Fry until golden brown.
6. Drain on paper towels and serve sprinkled with confectioners' sugar and/or maple syrup.
Makes 12-15.
